name: Bunny with Carrot
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a cute sitting bunny holding a big leafy carrot in both front paws and taking a happy nibble, tall upright ears, round cheeks, a small fluffy tail, big friendly eyes and whiskers

name: Sleepy Baby Bunny
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a tiny round baby bunny curled up and resting in a soft patch of grass, small folded ears, eyes gently closed, a little fluffy tail tucked in, a few flowers and blades of grass around it

name: Lop-Eared Bunny
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a fluffy lop-eared pet rabbit sitting calmly with both long ears hanging down beside its round face, a plump body, short front paws, and a soft fluffy chest

name: Hopping Rabbit
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a lively rabbit mid-hop with both back legs stretched and front paws tucked forward, ears swept back, a round fluffy tail, an excited open-mouth expression, a few blades of grass below

name: Bunny Portrait
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a close-up portrait of a rabbit's face and upper chest, large gentle eyes, a small triangular twitching nose, long upright ears with detailed inner fur, and a spray of whiskers on each cheek

name: Easter Bunny
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a cheerful Easter bunny standing upright and holding a woven basket filled with decorated eggs, a small bow at its neck, tall ears, a fluffy tail, and a couple of flowers at its feet

name: Wild Cottontail
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a wild cottontail rabbit alert in a meadow, body low and ears tall and listening, a round white tail, sitting among taller grasses and a few wildflowers, looking watchful

name: Rabbit in the Garden
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a happy rabbit standing in a vegetable garden beside a row of leafy carrot tops and a head of lettuce, a small wooden fence behind, a sun and a couple of clouds above

name: Bunny at the Burrow
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a rabbit peeking out from the round opening of its grassy burrow in a small hill, front paws resting on the edge, ears up, with tufts of grass and a few flowers growing around the entrance

name: Two Bunnies
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a pair of friendly rabbits sitting close together side by side, one slightly bigger than the other, both with tall ears and fluffy tails, leaning toward each other with happy smiles

name: Bunny with Flowers
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a sweet bunny sitting beside a small bouquet of daisies and tulips, sniffing one flower with its nose, tall ears up, a fluffy tail, and a couple of butterflies fluttering nearby

name: Fluffy Sitting Bunny
subject: animals/rabbit
prompt: a very simple round fluffy bunny sitting facing forward, two big upright ears, large round eyes, a tiny nose, small front paws, and a big round tail, drawn with bold chunky shapes for little hands
